review: Miserable. The "For a better experience, your device will need to use Location Accuracy" popup never goes away no matter how many times I press "No Thanks". If I turn on location accuracy, my phone goes into a reboot loop. please make the popup stop recurring every 0.5 seconds.
Randomly told me to pick up my order from last year

worked ok until something updated, it signed me out and now signing in with an email does nothing. with there being no password option it forces you to use an external link that literally does nothing. Just an example of another billion $ company who couldn't care less to put any money into the app to actually make it work.
